title: Self-Evolution Loop Timescales
brief: Technical infographic showing a three-tier self-evolution loop operating at different timescales: Tactical (seconds to minutes, immediate bug fixes), Strategic (hours to days, pattern extraction from multi-turn dialogues), Orchestration (days to weeks, skill topology reshaping via curator merging). Show as three concentric rings or three parallel timelines, clean soft-tech diagram style, Chinese/English bilingual labels. Suitable for mobile-width reading in a WeChat tech article.
